hooks.command: file_path=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$file_path" ] && exit 0; case "$file_path" in *.py) ruff format --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|.env*) echo 'Blocked: .env files are protected. Use environment variables instead.' >&2; exit 2;; */migrations/archive/*) echo 'Blocked: Archived migrations must not be modified.' >&2; exit 2;; *.lock|*.lock.*) echo 'Blocked: Lock files must not be modified manually.' >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty'); [ -z "$CONTENT" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|password\s*=\s*["'\'']{1}[^"'\'']{8,}["'\'']{1})'; then echo 'Warning: Potential hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty'); [ -z "$CONTENT" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'f"[^"]*\b(SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP)\b|f'\''[^'\'']*\b(SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP)\b'; then echo 'Warning: f-string SQL query detected. Use SQLAlchemy parameterized queries instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
MESSAGE=$(cat | jq -r '.message // "Claude Code needs your attention"'); command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude Code' "$MESSAGE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
